calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: Onboarding smoke test -- EWIN-PC (Eoin) [retry b]
items.notes: Re-run after GPU block hardening. Original V3-ONBOARD-smoke-EWIN-PC errored 2026-04-05 (exit code 1, 94.3s, no output file). Script now wraps Block 3 GPU in try/except (graceful fallback to CPU-only) and writes diagnostic error JSON on any crash.

items.title: ARC-029 committed-mode harm redesign (8 hazards, 5 seeds, majority rule)
items.notes: Redesign to fix low statistical power under SD-010/011/012 substrate. num_hazards 4->8, hazard_harm 0.02->0.05, proximity_harm_scale 0.05->0.15. Seeds [0,42,100,123,200] with majority rule C1/C2/C3>=4/5 seeds. MIN_HARM_GAP_STABLE raised 0.0001->0.001. harm_obs passed to sense() (SD-010 nociceptive stream active). EXQ-125 failed 3x: harm rates ~100x smaller than EXQ-063 due to substrate, making committed-gate advantage undetectable.

items.title: SD-012 drive_weight ablation fix (proximity_benefit_scale corrected)
items.notes: Fix for EXQ-233 design error: adds proximity_benefit_scale=0.18 so benefit_exposure exceeds seeding threshold. SD012_ACTIVE (drive_weight=2.0) vs SD012_ABLATED (drive_weight=0.0). Expected: ACTIVE seeds z_goal (norm>0.1), ABLATED does not (norm<0.05). Clean causal ablation proof.

items.title: MECH-120 SHY-Analog Normalisation Phase Ordering (SHY before vs after SWS)
items.note: Four conditions: WAKING_ONLY, SWS_NO_SHY, SHY_THEN_SWS (correct order), SWS_THEN_SHY (wrong order). Uses shy_normalise(decay=0.85) substrate addition. PASS: SHY_THEN_SWS has lower slot_cosine_sim than SWS_NO_SHY (S1) AND lower than SWS_THEN_SHY (S2) in >=2/3 seeds. Tests that SHY homeostasis before SWS is functionally necessary.

items.title: SD-011/SD-012 Full Integration Validation (urgency gating + affective amplification + drive extraction)
items.notes: First experiment exercising full SD-011/SD-012 co-design wired through E3. 4-arm: FULL (urgency+affective+drive) vs NO_URGENCY vs NO_AFFECT vs BASELINE. Tests z_harm_a urgency lowers commit threshold under threat (C1), affective amplification raises M(zeta) (C2), drive extraction enables z_goal seeding (C3), backward compat (C4), threshold separation (C5). 3 seeds x 200 train + 50 eval x 200 steps. PASS: all C1-C5.
